title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core for reading, writing, editing, and bash operations, extensible through custom or installed extensions from npm and git. It can integrate with multiple models including Kimi, MiniMax, and Qwen, addressing concerns about rate limits and costs from frontier models. The framework allows users to customize agent behavior through prompt templates and skills.
